---
description: "Use when editing README or docs to keep FE203 documentation consistent, instructional, and synchronized with behavior."
applyTo: "README.md,docs/**/*.md"
---

Documentation instructions for FE203:

- Keep docs instructional, not just reference-only.
- Keep examples runnable and consistent with current CLI and config behavior.
- When features are added or changed, update impacted pages in the same change.
- Prefer clear section titles and short paragraphs.
- Mention defaults, precedence, and mutually exclusive options where relevant.

Consistency checklist:
- CLI flags and output format docs match implementation.
- Config keys and value types match parser behavior.
- Changelog reflects user-visible additions/fixes.
- Roadmap is updated when planned items become implemented.

Style:
- Use plain technical language.
- Avoid hype and marketing language.
- Prefer concrete examples over abstract descriptions.
